summary: PASS. The current tree closes all four round-2 blockers: start and resume now seed a complete hydration plan, trigger server-driven hydration, persist `ready` before any running transition, publish an environment-aware live process payload on success, and publish `failed` without transitioning to running on failure. `corepack pnpm run verify` passed cleanly on April 15, 2026. I found one nonblocking traceability issue in the client test fixture layer, where some response fixtures still pair `environment: preparing` with `process.status: running`, but that mismatch does not overturn the story AC evidence or the passing gate.
